Changelog: - Updated API 14

DescriptionLoc: 一个制作宏录制插件。

Author: pupwife
Name: Dispeller
Description: Analyze your Glamour Dresser for shared models!
Punchline: Easily clean out your Glamour Dresser.
PunchlineLoc: 轻松清理你的幻化投影台。
DescriptionLoc: 分析你的幻化投影台中共用模型的装备！

Author: NeNeppie
Name: Avant-Garde
Description:
This plugin is a crowdsourced project, aiming to provide a comprehensive list for all hint categories.
See the github page for information on how you can contribute.
Punchline: Displays a list of valid gear pieces beside hints in the Fashion Report minigame.
PunchlineLoc: 在时尚品鉴小游戏的提示旁显示可用装备列表。
DescriptionLoc:
本插件是一个众包项目，目标是为所有提示类别提供完整列表。
如需了解如何贡献，请查看 github 页面。

Author: keifufu
Name: Facade
Description: Visually change the exterior appearance of any house so it's no longer an eyesore. (Note: Changes reset upon entering the plot to restore intended collission)
Punchline: Change your neighbours' housing exterior appearance.
PunchlineLoc: 更改邻居房屋的外观。
DescriptionLoc: 从视觉上更改任意房屋的外观，让它不再碍眼。（注意：进入房屋用地时更改会重置，以恢复预期碰撞）

Author: Tischel
Name: NOTED
Description:
Lets you create notes that are linked to specific duties (they will only show during those duties).
You can also tie notes to certain jobs so they only appear when on the right job.
Punchline: Duty-specific notes!
Changelog:
1.8.0.0

- Added support for Patch 7.5 and Dalamud API 15.
PunchlineLoc: 副本专用笔记！
DescriptionLoc:
让你创建与特定副本任务关联的笔记（只会在这些副本中显示）。
你也可以将笔记绑定到特定职业，使其只在正确职业时显示。

Author: perchbird
Name: PrefPro
Description:
Your character is personal, so you should be able to have NPCs refer to them
the way that you want. With PrefPro, you can control which text option
will appear when an NPC uses dialogue meant for a specific in-game gender.
This allows you to use a female player model and be referred to as male, and
vice versa. In addition, there are a few name customization options - if you
want to only be referred to by your last name, so be it.
Note: This plugin currently will not swap voiced cutscene dialogue.
Punchline: Changes in-game dialogue to reference your desired gender and name.
PunchlineLoc: 按你的性别与名字偏好调整游戏内对话。
DescriptionLoc:
你的角色属于你，因此 NPC 理应按你想要的方式称呼。使用 PrefPro，你可以控制 NPC 使用针对特定游戏内性别的台词时显示哪个文本选项。
这样你可以使用女性角色模型但被称作男性，反之亦然。此外还有一些名字自定义选项——如果你只想被姓氏称呼，也可以。
注意：本插件目前不会替换带配音过场动画中的语音对白。

Author: hunter2_, originally by Eisenhuth
Name: Big Nael Quotes
Description: Displays Nael quotes using the Dawntrail gimmick-text so they're easier to read.
Punchline: Makes Nael quotes more visible.
Changelog: api15
PunchlineLoc: 让奈尔的台词更醒目。
DescriptionLoc: 使用《金曦之遗辉》的演出式文本显示奈尔台词，便于阅读。

Author: kalilistic, maintained by khayle
Name: SillyChat
Description:
Allows you to translate player and NPC chat messages/bubbles.
Supported languages include: Pirate, Urianger, Leet, Pig Latin, Turkey, Moogle & Chocobo.
Punchline: Make chat more fun with translations like pirate and urianger.
PunchlineLoc: 用海盗腔、于里昂热腔等翻译让聊天更有趣。
DescriptionLoc:
允许你翻译玩家和 NPC 的聊天消息/气泡。
支持语言包括：海盗腔、于里昂热腔、Leet、Pig Latin、火鸡、莫古力和陆行鸟。

Author: Bronya Rand (formerly Franz, goat)
Name: Discord Rich Presence
Description: Show your zone, job, level, name, and world in your Discord status.
Punchline: Show your zone, job, level, name, and world in your Discord status
PunchlineLoc: 在 Discord 状态中显示你的区域、职业、等级、名字和服务器。
DescriptionLoc: 在 Discord 状态中显示你的区域、职业、等级、名字和服务器。

Author: Aida Enna
Name: Nicknamer
Description:
Lets you add a nickname to players in chat so you remember who they actually are or any other information you want to remember about them.
Supports different customization per person or global customization.
Punchline: Is this person Dew or Drew? I couldn't remember, so I made this plugin. Now I don't have to!
PunchlineLoc: 这人是 Dew 还是 Drew？我记不住，所以做了这个插件。现在不用记了！
DescriptionLoc:
让你能在聊天中为玩家添加昵称，以便记住他们到底是谁，或记录你想记住的其他信息。
支持为每个人单独自定义，也支持全局自定义。

Author: rail
Name: WDIGViewer
Description: A plugin to display encounter strategies, or cats.
Punchline: View encounter strategy images.
PunchlineLoc: 查看遭遇战攻略图。
DescriptionLoc: 用于显示战斗攻略，或者猫猫的插件。

Author: Stonewind
Name: Toastingway
Description: Displays new items, crystals, and gil as toasts.
Punchline: Keep on top of new items.
PunchlineLoc: 随时掌握新物品。
DescriptionLoc: 以弹窗通知显示新物品、水晶和金币。

Author: Treezy
Name: Gearset Sort
Description: A cleaner interface to sort your gearsets that allows both swap/insert methods.
Punchline: Better Gearset Sorting
PunchlineLoc: 更好用的装备套装排序
DescriptionLoc: 提供更清爽的装备套装排序界面，支持交换和插入两种方式。

Author: Caraxi
Name: Adventurer in Need
Description: Receive a notification when a duty roulette is in need of a role. /pbonus to setup
Punchline: Receive a notification when a duty roulette is in need of a role.
PunchlineLoc: 随机任务出现少数职能奖励时通知你。
DescriptionLoc: 随机任务出现少数职能奖励时通知你。使用 /pbonus 进行设置

Author: Saevath
Name: CrystalRadio
Description: Listen to your favorite internet radio stations directly in-game. Browse stations and manage your favorites. Use /cradio to open the radio player
Punchline: Stream internet radio stations while playing FFXIV
PunchlineLoc: 游玩 FFXIV 时收听网络电台。
DescriptionLoc: 直接在游戏内收听你喜爱的网络电台。浏览电台并管理收藏。使用 /cradio 打开电台播放器

Author: Mythic Palette
Name: Wordsmith
Description: Wordsmith is a text editor with roleplayers in mind. It automatically breaks your text up for easy copy/paste, has advanced features, spellcheck, and even a thesaurus.
Punchline: A roleplay thesaurus and scratch pad.
PunchlineLoc: 角色扮演用同义词词典和草稿本。
DescriptionLoc: Wordsmith 是面向角色扮演玩家的文本编辑器。它会自动将文本分段，方便复制/粘贴，并提供高级功能、拼写检查，甚至同义词词典。

Author: zhudotexe
Name: PaissaHouse
Description:
Looking for that perfect house? PaissaHouse lets you receive notifications when a new plot of land is up for sale on your home world.
View the list of all houses available on a world at https://paissadb.zhu.codes/!

Want to contribute? Check out the repository (globe icon below) for instructions.
Punchline: Crowdsourced housing alerts and lottery tracking for all.
PunchlineLoc: 面向所有人的众包房屋提醒与抽选追踪。
DescriptionLoc:
想找那栋完美的房子？PaissaHouse 可在你的本服有新地皮出售时通知你。
在 https://paissadb.zhu.codes/ 查看某个世界所有可购买房屋列表！

想贡献数据？请查看仓库（下方地球图标）获取说明。

Author: Dragon
Name: Hunt Buddy
Description: A daily hunt bill tracker
Punchline: Helps you track your daily hunt bills
PunchlineLoc: 帮助你追踪每日怪物狩猎通缉令
DescriptionLoc: 每日怪物狩猎通缉令追踪器

Author: kij
Name: ChatCoordinates
Description:
Places flag marker on map from coordinates in chat.
Opens map with given coordinates for current or given zone.
See "/coord" for configuration and usage info.
Punchline: Places flag marker on map from coordinates in chat.
PunchlineLoc: 根据聊天中的坐标在地图上放置旗帜标记。
DescriptionLoc:
根据聊天中的坐标在地图上放置旗帜标记。
使用当前或指定区域的坐标打开地图。
配置和用法请查看 "/coord"。

Author: Drahsid
Name: Target Lines
Description: Customizable target lines
Punchline: Customizable target lines
PunchlineLoc: 可自定义目标连线。
DescriptionLoc: 可自定义目标连线。

Author: Chivalrik
Name: Compass
Description:
Check-out the repository for steps on how to report missing/wrong filter
and hiding options. Have a look at the FAQ tab in the config window
after install for common caveats.
Punchline: Monodimensional compass for your adventures.
Changelog:
- chore: Update to API15 (thanks @ashen-dawn)

NOTE: Since 7.0, Compass seems to work funky in some cases.
I am sorry, but I cannot promise that I will manage to work on plugins for the foreseeable future.
I can, however, promise to have a look at any potential PR in a timely manner.
PunchlineLoc: 陪伴冒险的一维指南针。
DescriptionLoc:
请查看仓库中的步骤，了解如何报告缺失/错误的过滤器
和隐藏选项。安装后请查看设置窗口中的 FAQ 标签页，
了解常见注意事项。

Author: Kaz Wolfe
Name: BatteryGauge
Description:
Hey, you! Yes, you! Do you play FFXIV on your laptop or Steam Deck? Or are you so addicted to FFXIV that you have a UPS on your desktop just so you can keep playing through power outages? Then this is the plugin for you!

BatteryGauge adds a battery indicator to your server info bar showing your current battery percentage and expected remaining lifespan (as reported by Windows).
Punchline: Keep track of your FFXIV device's battery.
PunchlineLoc: 跟踪你运行 FFXIV 的设备电量。
DescriptionLoc:
嘿，你！没错，就是你！你是在笔记本电脑或 Steam Deck 上玩 FFXIV 吗？还是你已经沉迷 FFXIV 到为了停电也能继续玩，给台式机配了 UPS？那这款插件就是为你准备的！

BatteryGauge 会在服务器信息栏添加电池指示器，显示当前电量百分比和预计剩余使用时间（由 Windows 报告）。

Author: NotNite
Name: Distant Seas
Description:
The ultimate Ocean Fishing plugin. Automatically suggests baits, logs each boat you're on, tracks progress to achievements, adds a global point leaderboard, and more!

Icon from the Mutant Standard project.
Punchline: The ultimate Ocean Fishing plugin.
PunchlineLoc: 终极出海垂钓插件。
DescriptionLoc:
终极出海垂钓插件。自动推荐鱼饵，记录你参加的每一班船，追踪成就进度，添加全局点数排行榜等！

图标来自 Mutant Standard 项目。

Author: Cyenia, 53m1k0l0n, rennerdo30
Name: SimpleCompare
Description: Show simple item comparison when pressing SHIFT and hovering over item
Punchline: Simple item comparison
PunchlineLoc: 简易物品比较。
DescriptionLoc: 按住 SHIFT 并悬停在物品上时，显示简易物品比较。

Author: NightmareXIV
Name: XIV Instant Messenger
Description:
Features:
- Opes a direct message window when you message someone or they message you
- Each window contains your DM chat with certain person
- Open and cycle through recent chats with a hotkey
- Execute emote commands on a player from their DM window without needing to manually target them
- Automatically record your chat log in an easy to read text file
- Fully customizable styles
Punchline: A direct message manager made in fashion of WoW Instant Messenger.
PunchlineLoc: 仿 WoW Instant Messenger 的私聊管理器。
DescriptionLoc:
功能：
- 当你向某人发送悄悄话或收到对方悄悄话时，打开私聊窗口
- 每个窗口包含你与某位玩家的私聊记录
- 使用热键打开并循环切换最近聊天
- 无需手动选中玩家，即可从私聊窗口对其执行情感动作命令
- 自动将聊天记录保存为易读的文本文件
- 样式完全可自定义

Author: Anna, maintained by Khayle
Name: Namingway
Description: Rename abilities and status effects.
Punchline: Rename abilities and status effects.
Changelog: -# API 14 update
PunchlineLoc: 重命名技能和状态效果。
DescriptionLoc: 重命名技能和状态效果。

Author: Sonar Team
Name: Sonar
Description: Automatically send and receive hunt and fate relays. /sonar to open, /sonarconfig to configure. Support is only provided in the Sonar Support discord.
Punchline: Automatically send and receive hunt and fate relays.
Changelog: See https://news.ffxivsonar.com for more information
PunchlineLoc: 自动收发狩猎和 FATE 转发信息。
DescriptionLoc: 自动发送和接收狩猎及 FATE 转发信息。使用 /sonar 打开，使用 /sonarconfig 配置。仅在 Sonar Support Discord 提供支持。

Author: SaMo
Name: PvP Tracker
Description: Record, browse and filter your Crystalline Conflict, Frontline and Rival Wings match history, view match scoreboards and view aggregated statistics like win rate and average damage dealt per match.
Punchline: PvP match history and stats tracker.
Changelog: * Text alignment changes.
PunchlineLoc: PvP 对战历史与统计追踪器。
DescriptionLoc: 记录、浏览并筛选你的水晶冲突、战场和纷争前线对战历史，查看比赛计分板，并查看胜率、每场平均造成伤害等汇总统计。

Author: img
Name: Island Workshop Search
Description:
Search items by splitting search terms with | 
     Example: papri|shark|ink 

Step-by-step search by splitting terms with a comma [ , ] 
     Example: poti,garn,horn 
     Will search for 'poti' first, then after adding and reopening window, will search for 'garn' 

 Or just copy and paste the entire Overseas Casuals Squawkbox recommendations. 

Works with every game client language.
Punchline: Helps highlight relevant workshops items
PunchlineLoc: 帮助高亮相关的工坊物品。
DescriptionLoc:
用 | 分隔搜索词来搜索物品 
     示例：papri|shark|ink 

用逗号 [ , ] 分隔词条进行分步搜索 
     示例：poti,garn,horn 
     会先搜索 'poti'，添加后重新打开窗口时再搜索 'garn' 

 或者直接复制并粘贴完整的 Overseas Casuals Squawkbox 推荐。 

适用于所有游戏客户端语言。

Author: Lynesth, maintained by Khayle
Name: Better Targeting System
Description: A more intelligent targeting system for the game which also includes new keybinds.
Punchline: A more intelligent targeting system for the game.
PunchlineLoc: 更智能的游戏目标系统。
DescriptionLoc: 更智能的游戏目标系统，并包含新的键位绑定。

Author: Mei
Name: Oh Hey!
Description:
This plugin notifies you when someone targets you, or emotes at you.

Commands:
  /ohhey - Opens the main window
  /ohhey main - Opens the main window
  /ohhey [config|settings] - Opens the settings window
  /ohhey help - Displays the help message (will also display on invalid sub-commands)
Punchline: Ever wanted to get notified when someone targets you or emotes at you? Now you can!
PunchlineLoc: 有人选中你或对你做情感动作时想收到通知？现在可以了！
DescriptionLoc:
当有人选中你为目标，或对你做情感动作时，这个插件会通知你。

命令：
  /ohhey - 打开主窗口
  /ohhey main - 打开主窗口
  /ohhey [config|settings] - 打开设置窗口
  /ohhey help - 显示帮助消息（子命令无效时也会显示）

Author: Zeffuro
Name: StatusTimers
Description: StatusTimers provides clear, customizable bars for tracking your crucial buffs and debuffs. It helps you keep an eye on active effects, their remaining durations, and stacks, allowing you to optimize your gameplay without constantly staring at your tiny icons.
Punchline: Before StatusTimers, my buffs/debuffs were a mystery. Now, it's a well-organized history!
PunchlineLoc: 以前增减益一团谜，现在计时井井有条！
DescriptionLoc: StatusTimers 提供清晰、可自定义的进度条，用于追踪关键增益和减益。它能帮助你查看生效中的效果、剩余时间和层数，让你无需一直盯着小小的图标，也能优化操作。

Author: Sohtoren
Name: Altoholic
Description: Get informations (gils, currencies,  items, inventory, retainers, etc) and progress from all your characters
Punchline: Informations about your alts
PunchlineLoc: 查看你小号的信息。
DescriptionLoc: 获取你所有角色的信息（金币、货币、物品、物品栏、雇员等）和进度

Author: Infi, Sl0nderman, harbingerftw
Name: Blue Mage Helper
Description: Adds a window to show all Blue Magic, letting you search for spells and then teleport or mark the location on your map or open the dutyfinder. Can also mark mobs in world that drop spells you need.
Punchline: Helps you fill out your Blue Mage Spellbook
PunchlineLoc: 帮助你补全青魔法书。
DescriptionLoc: 添加一个窗口显示所有青魔法，方便你搜索技能，并传送、在地图上标记位置或打开任务搜索器。也可以在野外标记会掉落你所需技能的怪物。

Author: Kouzukii
Name: Price Insight
Description:
Whenever you mouseover an item, it will show you the NQ/HQ marketboard prices at the bottom as well as the most recent purchase.
Prices are retrieved from Universalis.app and cached for 90 minutes.
To refresh a price you can tap Alt while hovering over an item.
Punchline: See item marketboard prices on hover!
PunchlineLoc: 悬停即可查看物品市场板价格！
DescriptionLoc:
每当鼠标悬停在物品上时，会在底部显示 NQ/HQ 市场板价格以及最近一次成交。
价格从 Universalis.app 获取，并缓存 90 分钟。
悬停物品时轻按 Alt 可刷新价格。

Author: goat, modded by Franz
Name: Discord Chat Bridge
Description: This plugin allows you to receive your chat messages via Discord.
Punchline: Receive your chat messages via Discord.
Changelog:
Removed bot stop/start on logout/login events. It seems this was causing some issues.

The plugin will also now cache LocalPlayer on every Framework ticket instead of only on Login events. That should help with LocalPlayer resolutions showing up as null when they shouldn't be.
PunchlineLoc: 通过 Discord 接收你的聊天消息。
DescriptionLoc: 此插件可让你通过 Discord 接收聊天消息。

Author: MidoriKami
Name: HUDUnlimited
Description: Allows you to modify any and all individual elements of the user interface to allow you to customize it however you wish
Punchline: Total control of your User Interface
PunchlineLoc: 完全掌控你的用户界面
DescriptionLoc: 允许你修改用户界面中的任意单个元素，按自己的喜好进行自定义。

Author: Kliff!!
Name: Shanbells
Description: Replaces the word 'Gil' with 'Shanbells' (or something else entirely!) in the Currency window and Tooltips.
Punchline: Bringing Shananigans to Eorzea
PunchlineLoc: 把 Shananigans 带到艾欧泽亚。
DescriptionLoc: 在货币窗口和悬浮提示中，将 'Gil' 替换为 'Shanbells'（或完全替换成别的内容！）。

Author: Chirp
Name: SelfCare
Description: Configurable reminders to hydrate and maintain a healthy posture.
Punchline: Remember to check your posture!
PunchlineLoc: 记得检查你的坐姿！
DescriptionLoc: 可配置的提醒，提示你喝水并保持健康坐姿。

Author: Infi, kalilistic, Caitlyn
Name: PriceCheck
Description:
To check prices, hold your keybind and then hover over an item or via the item's context menu.
The prices are pulled from the crowd-sourced site Universalis.
Punchline: Quickly price check your items.
PunchlineLoc: 快速查看物品价格。
DescriptionLoc:
查看价格时，按住快捷键并将鼠标悬停在物品上，或通过物品的右键菜单操作。
价格来自众包网站 Universalis。

Author: Attick, daemitus, maintained by Khayle
Name: XIV Combo
Description: This plugin condenses combos and mutually exclusive abilities onto a single button. /pcombo to open menu
Punchline: PvP, but in PvE!
PunchlineLoc: PvE 里也用 PvP 风格！
DescriptionLoc: 此插件会将连击和互斥能力技整合到一个按钮上。使用 /pcombo 打开菜单。

Author: rail
Name: Aether48
Description: Opens on death, or /a48. A 2048 clone mini-game. arrow keys or wasd
Punchline: A game to play when dead. A 2048 clone mini-game.
Changelog:
v1.0.0.3:api bump
v1.0.0.2: bug fixes, see dalamud app store installer for plugin description
v1.0.0.0: clean up
v0.0.0.1:Initial release.

v1.0.0.3:api bump
v1.0.0.2: bug fixes, see dalamud app store installer for plugin description
v1.0.0.0: clean up
v0.0.0.1:Initial release.

DescriptionLoc: 死亡时自动打开，也可使用 /a48 打开。2048 克隆小游戏。方向键或 wasd 操作

Author: 0x0ade
Name: CustomEqualizer
Description: Did you know that the EQ presets in the system settings are powered by a 4-band EQ? Let's make our own presets!
Punchline: Tweak the built-in 4-band EQ with custom presets.
PunchlineLoc: 用自定义预设调整内置 4 段均衡器。
DescriptionLoc: 你知道系统设置里的 EQ 预设其实由 4 段均衡器驱动吗？来做我们自己的预设吧！

Author: Beletre
Name: Job Mount Roulette
Description: Enhance your mount roulette experience by customizing which mounts may appear for each job individually.
Punchline: Customized mount roulette per job.
PunchlineLoc: 按职业自定义坐骑随机。
DescriptionLoc: 为每个职业单独自定义可随机出现的坐骑，提升你的坐骑随机体验。

Author: NeNeppie
Name: Lights, Camera, Action!
Description: This plugin lets you save unlimited camera & lighting configurations/presets in Group Pose at a time, vastly improving over the vanilla feature which lets you save only one of each.
Punchline: Save and load unlimited camera and lighting presets in Group Pose
PunchlineLoc: 在集体动作中保存并加载不限数量的镜头与照明预设。
DescriptionLoc: 本插件可让你在集体动作中一次保存不限数量的镜头与照明配置/预设，比原版只能各保存一套的功能大幅提升。

Author: Koenari
Name: Himbeertoni Raid Tool
Description: A collection of useful tools for raid groups, including loot management
Punchline: All you need for Raiding
Changelog:
General: Updated for 7.5

Author: iri

Description:
Take your portrait & adventurer plate game to the next level with this companion panel for the portrait editor.

• Adjust character head and eye direction without moving the camera.
• Position camera and pivot point with a top-down map.

Highlights gear, coffers, and materia needed for all your gearsets

    - Need/Greed Loot Windows
    - NPC Shops and Exchanges

    - Player Inventories
    - Item Tooltips

    - Items to meld
    - Materia to meld to item
            
Automatically syncs gearsets with player inventory

可从 Etro、Xivgear 或 Teamcraft 导入，轻松设置

自动根据玩家物品栏同步装备套装

Author: X'pahtalo
Name: FFXIV2MQTT
Description: Send data to an MQTT broker to do all sorts of things. Change your lights with a macro, turn on the heater when you use Overheat, or start playing Rules of Nature when you switch to Gunbreaker. Requires an MQTTv5 compatible broker.

Author: spide-r
Name: Who Did That?

This plugin can track the following actions:
- Rescues
- Healing actions
- Status/Buff Application
- Cleanses 
- Heals
- Mitigation
- Provoke
- Shirk

These will be logged in your chat when they are used on your character.
Punchline: Actively logs healing, cleanses, buffs, and more. Finally figure out who rescued you.
PunchlineLoc: 主动记录治疗、驱散、增益等。终于知道是谁对你用了营救。

此插件可以记录以下行动：
- 营救
- 治疗技能
- 状态/增益附加
- 驱散
- 治疗
- 减伤
- 挑衅
- 退避

当这些行动被用于你的角色时，会记录到聊天中。

Author: Nightshade System
Name: PushyFinder

Author: K-Cli
Name: Bozja Buddy
Description:
Features:
• Resistance relic guide and tracking.
• Info about Lost Actions, Fragments, FATEs/CE, Field Notes e.g. location, drops, marketboard price, fate chains, mettle rewards, exp rewards, etc.
• Node graph viewer.
• Weather forecast.
• Alarms based on time, weather, and FATE/CE.
• Custom loadouts planning, saving, and sharing. Featuring recommended loadouts from many communities.
• Overlay for Lost Find Cache. Filterable by name, role, fragment, weight, and Custom Loadout of choice.
• View Bozja stats and Cache from anywhere. Customisable alert for actions that are running low.
• Delubrum Reginae (Savage) resources and communities.
Punchline: Improve your Bozja suffering. Maybe.
PunchlineLoc: 改善你的博兹雅受苦体验。大概。
DescriptionLoc:
功能：
• 义军武器指南与进度追踪。
• 提供失传技能、碎晶、危命任务/CE、战果记录等信息，例如位置、掉落、市场板价格、FATE 链、战果奖励、经验奖励等。
• 节点图查看器。
• 天气预报。
• 基于时间、天气和 FATE/CE 的提醒。
• 自定义配置的规划、保存与分享。包含来自多个社区的推荐配置。
• 失传技能库悬浮窗。可按名称、职能、碎晶、重量和所选自定义配置过滤。
• 随时随地查看博兹雅属性和失传技能库。可为数量不足的技能设置自定义提醒。
• 女王古殿（零式）资源与社区。

Author: Xorus
Name: EngageTimer
Description:
Finally, display all the numbers when starting a countdown!
Comes with an accurate pull timer that starts when you or any of your party members enter combat.

Features :
- Big countdown that displays all the numbers
- Customizable big-number textures (default, yellow, WoW style or custom files)
- Display combat time in the Server Info Bar, and/or a floating window
- OBS browser-source compatible page with countdown and current combat duration

Why the OBS thing ? I like having a big stylized stopwatch in my private recordings and that's about it.
See repository for more info.

Feel free so send me feedback, bugs and potential improvements! Check the about page in the plugin settings for more
info. Please report urgent feedback on GitHub or XIVLauncher Discord's support thread for this plugin.
Punchline: Complete combat countdown, pull timer and OBS overlay
Changelog: - API15 update
PunchlineLoc: 完整的战斗倒计时、开怪计时器和 OBS 叠加层。
DescriptionLoc:
终于，在开始倒计时时显示所有数字！
附带精确的开怪计时器，会在你或任意小队成员进入战斗时启动。

功能：
- 显示所有数字的大号倒计时
- 可自定义大号数字贴图（默认、黄色、WoW 风格或自定义文件）
- 在服务器信息栏和/或浮动窗口中显示战斗时间
- 兼容 OBS 浏览器源的页面，显示倒计时和当前战斗持续时间

为什么要做 OBS 这个东西？我只是喜欢在私人录像里放一个大号风格化秒表，仅此而已。
更多信息请参见仓库。

欢迎向我反馈、报告 bug 和提出潜在改进！更多信息请查看插件设置中的关于页面。如有紧急反馈，请在 GitHub 或 XIVLauncher Discord 的该插件支持帖中报告。

Author: smileyhead
Name: Sticky Focus Target
Description:
(PvE-only.) Adds the /stickyfocustarget command, which focuses your current
target, as long as you do not already have a focus target set.
  
Have you ever felt focusing was under-utilised? Wanted to use it without a
dedicated keybind? Do you not even know what focus targeting is?
You've come to the right place.
  
You can add this command to your Attack Nearest macro and ensure that the
first enemy you target will also become focused, and stay that way, until it dies.
With this, you can focus enemies without having to consciously press a keybind,
and ensure that, for instance, when a focused boss spawns an add and you target it,
the boss' focus will NOT get overriden.

This plugin does not change the behaviour of the stock /focustarget command,
and must be triggered either manually or by adding it to a macro.
Placeholders are supported.
Punchline: Like /focustarget, but with no overrides.
Changelog: Initial release.
PunchlineLoc: 类似 /focustarget，但不会覆盖已有焦点。
DescriptionLoc:
（仅限 PvE。）添加 /stickyfocustarget 命令：只要你尚未设置焦点目标，就会将当前目标设为焦点目标。
  
你是否觉得焦点目标一直没被充分利用？想在不单独设置键位的情况下使用它？甚至还不知道焦点目标是什么？
你来对地方了。
  
你可以把这个命令加入“攻击最近目标”宏，确保你选中的第一个敌人也会成为焦点目标，并一直保持，直到它死亡。
这样一来，你无需刻意按键就能设置敌人为焦点目标；例如，当被设为焦点的 Boss 召唤小怪而你转而选中小怪时，Boss 的焦点目标也不会被覆盖。

本插件不会改变原版 /focustarget 命令的行为，必须手动触发，或将其加入宏中触发。
支持占位符。

Author: Infi, Caitlyn
Name: Death Roll Helper
Description:
## Modes
### Venue:
- Concise display of all concurrent players in a list-based format
- Supports multiple sorting types (min, max, nearest to)
- Highlight numbers based on regex matching

### DeathRoll:
- Supports multiple players
- Automatic checks to prevent number skipping

### Tournament (1v1 DeathRoll):
- Automatic bracket generation with byes to fill uneven
- Forfeit functionality if a player needs to leave

### Blackjack:
- Automatic reward calculation based on common rules
- Simplistic, or visual view of cards in play
- Automatic or manual player-based draw for cards

### Extra Features:
- Block or prevent players from partaking in any game
- Accept only /random or /dice commands

## Games
### Tic-Tac-Toe
- Play against your friends, or AI
- Easy, Medium, Hard
- 3x3, 4x4, 5x5

### Minesweeper
- Easy, Medium, Hard
- 8x8, 9x9, 16x16, 18x30
- Custom Games (planned)

More features are planned, following user feedback.

PunchlineLoc: 帮助游玩多种骰子游戏的插件，也提供井字棋、扫雷和 Bahamood 等游戏。
DescriptionLoc:
## 模式
### 场地：
- 以列表形式简洁显示所有同时参与的玩家
- 支持多种排序类型（最小、最大、最接近）
- 根据正则匹配高亮数字

### 死亡骰：
- 支持多名玩家
- 自动检查以防止跳号

### 锦标赛（1v1 死亡骰）：
- 自动生成对阵表，并用轮空补齐不均衡人数
- 如果玩家需要离开，可使用弃权功能

### 21点：
- 根据常见规则自动计算奖励
- 可用简洁视图或可视化视图显示牌局中的卡牌

### 井字棋
- 与朋友或 AI 对战

### 扫雷

Author: Blooym
Name: GoodFriend
Description:
Key Features:
- Receive notifications when friends using GoodFriend log in or out.
- Chat messages show how many of your friends are online when you log in.

Developer's Note on Using This Plugin After Patch 7.0:
As of Patch 7.0, some of the data that GoodFriend uses to identify players during login/logout events is now visible to anyone nearby your character in-game (not just your friends or party members). GoodFriend itself will still only show notifications for people you've added to your in-game friends list - however, please use this plugin only if you're comfortable with your login/logout activity being theoretically visible to nearby players (note: GoodFriend never sends data for users who don't have the plugin installed).

If you ever want to stop sending login/logout events, simply disable or uninstall the plugin. The server does not store any data about you.

For added privacy, you can now set a 'group key' in the plugin settings. This allows events to be shared only with people using the same key (for example, everyone in your raid group). When a group key is active, your events are never visible to anyone outside your group no matter what.
Punchline: Improvements to the in-game friend system, including login and logout notifications for your friends, and more.
PunchlineLoc: 改进游戏内好友系统，包括好友登录/登出通知等功能。
DescriptionLoc:
主要功能：
- 当使用 GoodFriend 的好友登录或登出时接收通知。
- 你登录时，聊天消息会显示有多少好友在线。

开发者关于 Patch 7.0 后使用本插件的说明：
自 Patch 7.0 起，GoodFriend 用于识别玩家登录/登出事件的部分数据，现在会对你角色附近的任何游戏内玩家可见（不只是你的好友或小队成员）。GoodFriend 本身仍只会显示你已添加到游戏内好友列表的人的通知——不过，请仅在你能接受自己的登录/登出活动理论上可被附近玩家看到时使用本插件（注意：GoodFriend 永远不会为未安装本插件的用户发送数据）。

如果你想停止发送登录/登出事件，只需禁用或卸载插件。服务器不会存储任何关于你的数据。

为增强隐私性，你现在可以在插件设置中设置“group key”。这会让事件只与使用相同 key 的人共享（例如你的固定队成员）。启用 group key 后，无论如何，你的事件都不会被你组外的任何人看到。

Author: ash

Description:
Once installed, join a Discord voice channel and an XIV party, and have people put their character names in their Discord nicknames (or configure things manually in the plugin settings). You should get colourful outlines around the job icons on the party list: green for talking, blue for muted, red for deafened, and yellow for unknown name.

Note that you'll get a permission prompt mentioning "StreamKit Overlay" – this is expected.

Some icons by Google, Apache 2.0.
Punchline: See Discord voice activity indicators directly on your party list.
PunchlineLoc: 在小队列表直接查看 Discord 语音活动指示器。

请注意，你会看到提及 "StreamKit Overlay" 的权限提示——这是正常现象。

Some icons by Google, Apache 2.0.

Author: tesu
Name: Penny Pincher
Description:
Plugin for simplifying "pennying" (undercutting current lowest offer by 1).

The usual workflow for this is the following:
1. Open up the adjust price menu for the item you're undercutting
2. Click on the compare prices menu to view the current listings
3. Take a mental note of what the current lowest offer is
4. Subtract one from it
5. Close the current listings window
6. Update your item's price with the number you noted
7. Confirm your new price

This plugin eliminates the mental notekeeping steps in the middle by automatically copying the number you want onto your clipboard when you open the current listings window.  

Therefore, your new workflow becomes this:
1. Open up the adjust price menu for the item you're undercutting
2. Click on the compare prices menu to view the current listings
3. Close the current listings window
4. Paste the undercut value in
5. Confirm your new price

This both speeds up the process and reduces room for error from typos.
Punchline: Copies 1 below the cheapest offer to your clipboard when you check marketboard prices
PunchlineLoc: 查看市场板价格时，将比最低价低 1 的价格复制到剪贴板。
DescriptionLoc:
用于简化“压价”（比当前最低价低 1）的插件。

通常流程如下：
1. 打开要压价物品的调整价格菜单
2. 点击比较价格菜单，查看当前挂单
3. 记下当前最低价
4. 从中减去 1
5. 关闭当前挂单窗口
6. 用你记下的数字更新物品价格
7. 确认新价格

这个插件会在你打开当前挂单窗口时，自动把你需要的数字复制到剪贴板，从而省去中间的记忆步骤。  

因此，你的新流程变为：
1. 打开要压价物品的调整价格菜单
2. 点击比较价格菜单，查看当前挂单
3. 关闭当前挂单窗口
4. 粘贴压价数值
5. 确认新价格

这既能加快流程，也能减少打错数字导致出错的空间。

Author: Critical_Impact
Name: Allagan Tools
Description:
Allagan Tool's primary purpose is to keep track of items across your characters/retainers/free company. With it's filter system you'll never lose track of items or not know where they should be sorted.

While this is it's primary purpose, it has quite an exhaustive list of other features including:
	- Craft planning
	- Market board integration
	- Item highlighting in inventories when searching/sorting and picking ingredients for crafts
	- Item window that includes vendor and source information among other things
	- Duty/mob/airship/submarine windows that are fully searchable

	- Tooltip integration that'll let you see where the items are on hover

除此之外，它还提供非常丰富的功能，包括：

Author: WildWolf

DescriptionLoc: 用 ImGui 实现替换游戏内地图，并添加多项额外功能。

Author: Brolijah
Name: Simple Triggers
Description:
This plugin allows you to create custom triggers to in-game messages.
Options include responding through in-game chat, popup toasts, in-game sound effects, and even Text-to-Speech.
Punchline: For those of us too lazy to read their screens.
PunchlineLoc: 献给懒得看屏幕的我们。
DescriptionLoc:
本插件允许你为游戏内消息创建自定义触发器。
选项包括通过游戏内聊天回应、弹窗通知、游戏内音效，甚至 Text-to-Speech。

Author: Glyceri
Name: Acquisition Date
Description:
Shows the date when you acquired:
- Achievements
- Quests
- Duties
- Levels
- Fish
- Sightseeing Log Entries
- Glasses
- Minions
- Mounts
- Orchestrion Rolls
- Fashion Accessories
And More!
Punchline: Shows the date when you acquired something.
PunchlineLoc: 显示你获得某项内容的日期。
DescriptionLoc:
显示你获得以下内容的日期：
- 成就
- 任务
- 副本任务
- 等级
- 鱼类
- 探险笔记条目
- 眼镜
- 宠物
- 坐骑
- 管弦乐琴乐谱
- 时尚配饰
以及更多！

Author: Aida Enna
Name: Teamcraft List Maker
Description:
No more alt tabbing, no more writing down names of items, just add and export!

This plugin is not created by Teamcraft staff and they are not responsible for it. To report issues or request new features, please click the globe icon and submit them using the issues tab.

(Logo used with permission from Teamcraft owner)
Punchline: Adds a new menu when right clicking items that lets you easily add/remove items to a list and then export it to Teamcraft
PunchlineLoc: 右键物品即可加入/移出清单并导出到 Teamcraft。
DescriptionLoc:
不用再 Alt+Tab 切来切去，也不用手抄物品名称，添加后导出即可！

本插件并非由 Teamcraft 工作人员创建，他们不对其负责。若要报告问题或请求新功能，请点击地球图标，并在 issues 选项卡提交。

（Logo 已获 Teamcraft owner 许可使用）

Author: img02
Name: Hunt Helper
Description: Hunt map with spawns points, A-Rank train recorder (w/ export/import sharing), TTS, Chat notifications, Counters for S-Rank Spawns
Punchline: basically a hunt radar + train recorder + notifications + s rank utils +++.
PunchlineLoc: 基本就是狩猎雷达 + 车队记录器 + 通知 + S级工具等等。
DescriptionLoc: 带刷新点的狩猎地图、A级车队记录器（含导出/导入分享）、TTS、聊天通知、S级刷新计数器

Author: Speedas
Name: Emote log
Description: Adds a window logging all emotes used on you, so you never miss a sneaky dote again.
Punchline: Track who used what emotes on you.
PunchlineLoc: 追踪谁对你使用了哪些情感动作。
DescriptionLoc: 添加一个窗口，记录所有对你使用的情感动作，让你不会再错过偷偷对你用的 dote。

Author: Glyceri
Name: Fatal Frame
Description: Takes a screenshot upon death (and other events).
Punchline: Takes a screenshot upon death (and other events).
PunchlineLoc: 死亡（及其他事件）时自动截图。
DescriptionLoc: 死亡（及其他事件）时自动截图。

Author: MidoriKami
Name: Chill Frames
Description: Tired of your GPU melting your face off while just running around? Why render at 240 FPS when you're just staring at that gathering node? Fret no more! Chill Frames allows you dynamically limit your framerate when doing unimportant tasks!
Punchline: Dynamic Framerate Limiter, changes fps limit depend on what you are doing
PunchlineLoc: 动态帧率限制器，随当前行为调整 FPS 上限。
DescriptionLoc: 只是四处跑时，GPU 却热得要融化？只是盯着采集点，为什么还要渲染 240 FPS？不用愁！Chill Frames 可以在进行不重要的事情时动态限制帧率！

Author: Pilzinsel64, r00telement
Name: Player Tags
Description:
Lightweight job visibility in nameplates and chat. Create custom tags and add them to players with the context menu.

You want to contribute and help developing new features or want to extend existing? Feel free to open Fork and open a Pull Request!

This plugin was originally developed by r00telement but forked and continued by Pilzinsel64.
Punchline: Lightweight job visibility in nameplates and chat.
PunchlineLoc: 在姓名板和聊天中轻量显示职业。
DescriptionLoc:
在姓名板和聊天中轻量显示职业。创建自定义标签，并通过右键菜单将其添加到玩家身上。

如果你想贡献代码、帮助开发新功能，或扩展现有功能，欢迎 Fork 并提交 Pull Request！

本插件最初由 r00telement 开发，后由 Pilzinsel64 Fork 并继续维护。

Author: Aida Enna
Name: Food Check
Description: See who is missing (or running out of) food buff at countdown start and/or ready check and post to echo chat with a customizable message.
Punchline: Someone in our group wouldn't eat their food. I got tired of keeping track if they had or not. Now the plugin does.
PunchlineLoc: 队里有人不吃食物。我懒得再盯着看，现在交给插件。
DescriptionLoc: 在倒计时开始和/或确认准备时，查看谁没有食物增益（或即将结束），并用可自定义消息发送到默语频道。

Author: isaiahcat, keifufu
Name: QuestTracker
Description: Easily track quest completion
Punchline: For the quest completionist
PunchlineLoc: 献给任务全收集玩家
DescriptionLoc: 轻松追踪任务完成情况

Author: Violet Stardust
Name: XivGearExport
Description:
A plugin that allows easy export of your gearsets to xivgear.app in edit or view mode. Also includes the ability to export your gearsets from the gearset list.

Use /xivgearexport or /xge to export your current gear set.
Punchline: A simple utility that allows easy export of your gearsets to xivgear.app.
PunchlineLoc: 轻松将装备套装导出到 xivgear.app。
DescriptionLoc:
可在编辑或查看模式下，轻松将你的装备套装导出到 xivgear.app 的插件。也支持从装备套装列表导出。

使用 /xivgearexport 或 /xge 导出当前装备套装。

Author: PunishedPineapple
Name: Item Use
Description: Displays indicators in the item help popup for when an item is used by leves, GC dailies, etc. to help you decide what is worth keeping, selling, or taking as a reward.
Punchline: Easily see common item uses.
PunchlineLoc: 轻松查看常见物品用途。
DescriptionLoc: 当物品会用于理符任务、军队筹备等内容时，在物品帮助弹窗中显示指示，帮助你判断是保留、出售还是作为奖励领取。

Author: Tischel
Name: TPie
Description: Highly configurable hotbars that can be toggled with a keybind. They can be filled with Actions, Items, Gear Sets, Macros and more...
Punchline: Customizable ring-shaped hotbars
Changelog:
# 1.14.0.0

- Added support for Patch 7.5 and Dalamud API 15.
PunchlineLoc: 可自定义的环形热键栏。
DescriptionLoc: 可通过键位切换的高度可配置热键栏。可放入技能、物品、套装、宏等……

Author: goat, Maple
Name: Ultrawide Cutscenes
Description: A sample plugin.
Punchline: Remove letterboxing from cutscenes on ultrawide monitors.
PunchlineLoc: 移除超宽屏显示器上过场动画的黑边。
DescriptionLoc: 示例插件。

Author: nebel
Name: Currency Watchdog
Description: Provides a configurable overlay, configurable alerts, and a powerful rule system for displaying how many currency (or non-currency) items you have (or don't have). A spiritual successor to CurrencyAlert.
Punchline: Shows an overlay and/or sends alerts when your held currency items (or non-currency items) match configurable rules. A spiritual successor to CurrencyAlert.
PunchlineLoc: 持有的货币道具（或非货币道具）符合规则时显示悬浮窗和/或提醒。
DescriptionLoc: 提供可配置的悬浮窗、提醒和强大的规则系统，用于显示你拥有（或没有）多少货币（或非货币）道具。CurrencyAlert 的精神续作。

Author: VariableVixen
Name: AutoMountBgm
Description: Some mounts have really cool BGM tracks (Cruise Chaser FTW) while others are almost sickening in how much you hear them. It's annoying to keep needing to use /mountbgm, but now you won't have to - just let the plugin do it for you!
Punchline: Automatically control mount BGM for individual mounts!
PunchlineLoc: 按单个坐骑自动控制坐骑 BGM！
DescriptionLoc: 有些坐骑的 BGM 真的很酷（Cruise Chaser FTW），另一些却听到让人快受不了。总是要用 /mountbgm 很麻烦，但现在不用了——交给插件自动处理吧！

Author: Berna, kai, Kiri
Name: Congratulations
Description:
Get aurally rewarded when you get commended on duties.

Comes with default sounds for when you get commended by 1/3, 2/3, 3/3 or all seven members of the duty you were in, but you can set custom sounds for each type of trigger by opening /congratsconfig.

The fractioned values are in relation to how many of those members could commend you (i.e. excluding those that were in your party before joining the duty).
Punchline: Get aurally rewarded when you get commended on duties.
PunchlineLoc: 在副本任务中获得推荐时播放声音奖励。
DescriptionLoc:
在副本任务中获得推荐时播放声音奖励。

内置默认音效，分别对应副本中 1/3、2/3、3/3 或全部 7 名成员给你推荐；你也可以打开 /congratsconfig 为每种触发条件设置自定义音效。

这些分数值是相对于可以给你推荐的成员数量（即不包括进入副本前就在你小队中的成员）。

Author: Sylf
Name: Monster Loot Hunter
Description: Check where you can obtain a material from monsters, duties, crafting, gathering or where they can be bought from NPCs.
Punchline: Check where you can obtain materials.
Changelog: - Update for API 15
PunchlineLoc: 查询素材的获取地点。
DescriptionLoc: 查询某种素材可从怪物、副本任务、制作、采集获得，或可从哪些 NPC 处购买。

Author: Bronya Rand
Name: WukLamark
Description:
Allows players to create and manage persistent custom map markers across Eorzea. Whether it's a favorite GPose spot, a venue you want to revisit, or any interesting location, WukLamark lets you drop a map marker that appears seamlessly on both your main map and minimap.

Features:
- Customizable game icons and shapes for map markers (with optional icon tinting).
- Custom map marker icons.
   > To add a custom icon, open the WukLamark window and click on 'Upload a new custom icon'.
- Per-marker icon/shape sizes.
- Organize map markers into groups (with map marker import/export).
- Cross-character sharing configurations.
- Crossworld markers.
- Add personal notes for context.
- Import/export one or multiple map markers with friends.
- Templates for quick map marker creation with predefined properties.

Think of it as dropping a flag on the map but persistent.
Punchline: Create custom map markers on the map/minimap! Like <flag> but permanent.
PunchlineLoc: 在地图/小地图上创建自定义地图标记！像 <flag> 一样，但会永久保留。
DescriptionLoc:
允许玩家在艾欧泽亚各地创建和管理持久的自定义地图标记。无论是喜欢的 GPose 拍照点、想再次造访的场所，还是任何有趣地点，WukLamark 都能让你放置一个地图标记，并无缝显示在主地图和小地图上。

功能：
- 可自定义地图标记的游戏图标和形状（可选图标染色）。
- 自定义地图标记图标。
   > 要添加自定义图标，请打开 WukLamark 窗口并点击 'Upload a new custom icon'。
- 每个标记单独设置图标/形状大小。
- 将地图标记整理到分组中（支持地图标记导入/导出）。
- 跨角色共享配置。
- 跨服务器标记。
- 添加个人备注以补充背景。
- 与好友导入/导出一个或多个地图标记。
- 使用预设属性的模板快速创建地图标记。

可以把它想成在地图上插旗，但会永久保留。

Author: Helios
Name: Adaptive Hud
Description:
Useful for ultrawide users, swapping from windowed/fullscreen will automatically switch your hudlayout.

/pah to configure
Punchline: Switches your /hudlayout when your game switches from windowed to fullscreen.
PunchlineLoc: 在窗口/全屏切换时切换你的 /hudlayout。
DescriptionLoc:
对超宽屏用户很有用：在窗口模式和全屏之间切换时，会自动切换你的界面布局。

使用 /pah 进行设置

Author: NightmareXIV
Name: NotificationMaster
Description: Notifies you about various events while your game is minimized.
Punchline: Currently supports notifications: chat messages, approaching map flag, duty found, ending of cutscenes, gp restoration, error during logging in, mob has been pulled.
PunchlineLoc: 支持聊天、地图旗帜、副本匹配、过场结束等通知。
DescriptionLoc: 在游戏最小化时通知你各种事件。

Author: Infi
Name: Easy MBHistory
Description: Copies the marketboard transaction history into your clipboard with configurable options.
Punchline: Useful for when you want to quickly export marketboard transaction history.
PunchlineLoc: 想快速导出市场板交易历史时非常实用。
DescriptionLoc: 按照可配置选项将市场板交易历史复制到剪贴板。

Author: wompscode
Name: AFKMute
Description: Mutes your game when you're AFK. /afkmute to toggle.
Punchline: Mutes your game when you're AFK.
PunchlineLoc: AFK 时将游戏静音。
DescriptionLoc: AFK 时将游戏静音。使用 /afkmute 切换。

Author: athene
Name: NICE Damage Flyouts
Description: Adds the message NICE to your damage flyout when you get a hit ending in 69. Also 67, optionally. Also, your own custom numbers now.
Punchline: Adds the message NICE to your damage flyout when you get a hit ending in 69.
PunchlineLoc: 伤害尾数为 69 时，在飘字中加入 NICE。
DescriptionLoc: 伤害尾数为 69 时，在伤害飘字中加入 NICE。也可选择 67。现在也支持你自定义数字。

Author: Nuffin
Name: Better Mount Roulette
Description: Allows any number of mounts to be enabled for the mount roulette, instead of having to choose between the "up to 30" and "EVERYTHING" modes supported by the game.
Punchline: Choose which mounts show up in the mount roulette.
PunchlineLoc: 选择哪些坐骑会出现在随机坐骑中。
DescriptionLoc: 允许在随机坐骑中启用任意数量的坐骑，不必在游戏支持的“最多 30 个”和“EVERYTHING”模式之间二选一。

Author: Bluefissure
Name: No Kill Plugin
Description: A simple plugin that prevent the game from killing itself with lobby error.
Punchline: Don't kill game with lobby error.
PunchlineLoc: 避免大厅错误直接关掉游戏。
DescriptionLoc: 一个简单插件，可防止游戏因大厅错误而自行关闭。

Author: Infi
Name: Inspecto
Description: A simple plugin that keeps a history of people you inspected.
Punchline: Look back at that cute search comment even hours later~
PunchlineLoc: 过几小时也能回看那条可爱的搜索信息～
DescriptionLoc: 一个简单插件，会保存你查看过的玩家历史。

Author: Chickenstew
Name: Stormtalons
Description: Gives the value of current targets health in Stormtalons from the dead game Wildstar.
Punchline: Gives the value of current targets health in Stormtalons from the dead game Wildstar.
PunchlineLoc: 用已停运游戏 Wildstar 中的 Stormtalons 显示当前目标生命值。
DescriptionLoc: 用已停运游戏 Wildstar 中的 Stormtalons 显示当前目标生命值。

Author: perchbird (originally Meli)
Name: Orchestrion Plugin
Description:
Orchestrion Plugin allows you to change the currently playing in-game BGM. It includes
a curated list of the most accurate in-game song titles, so you know exactly what's playing,
if you want to know later! Add favorite songs to separate them from the rest.
Note: This plugin does not currently allow you to play actual orchestrion songs.
Punchline: Adds a simple front-end for browsing and changing the in-game BGM.
Changelog:
2.3.0.1:
Fixed bug where Deep Dungeon mode would not switch tracks
2.3.0.0:
Long-awaited new feature, implemented by @NPittinger!
The Orchestrion plugin can now report the titles of songs played inside housing instances and inns by the Orchestrion furnishing.
Limitations:
- The plugin still cannot play Orchestrion rolls.
- Titles of songs played inside housing instances can appear in the server bar and in chat messages.
- Songs played inside housing instances will not appear in your listening history and cannot be added to playlists.
- Only English and Japanese titles are available for Orchestrion rolls, as those are the only languages provided by the game.
PunchlineLoc: 为浏览和更换游戏内 BGM 添加简单前端。
DescriptionLoc:
Orchestrion Plugin 可让你更改当前播放的游戏内 BGM。它包含一份精心整理、尽可能准确的游戏内曲名列表，方便你确切知道正在播放什么，或留到之后查看！可将喜欢的曲目加入收藏，与其他曲目分开。
注意：此插件目前不能播放实际的管弦乐琴曲目。

Author: Tischel
Name: ActionTimeline
Description: Configurable timeline display of all the actions you use.
Punchline: Show your actions in real-time.
Changelog:
# 1.9.0.0

- Added support for Patch 7.5 and Dalamud API 15.
PunchlineLoc: 实时显示你使用的技能。
DescriptionLoc: 以可配置的时间轴显示你使用的所有技能。

Author: Haselnussbomber
Name: MogMogCheck
Description: MogMogCheck is a small plugin to assist you in tracking the rewards of the Moogle Treasure Trove event (called Mog Mog Kollektion in German, hence the name).
Punchline: Tracking assistant for Moogle Treasure Trove rewards.
PunchlineLoc: 莫古莫古大收集奖励追踪助手。
DescriptionLoc: MogMogCheck 是一个小插件，用于帮助你追踪莫古莫古大收集活动的奖励（德语名为 Mog Mog Kollektion，因此得名）。

Author: Caraxi, maintained & updated by Khayle
Name: Item Search
Description:
Filterable search for Items and Key Items.
Try on any item without having to find someone to link it.
Punchline: Search and link items, even if you don't have them.
PunchlineLoc: 即使没有物品，也能搜索并发送物品链接。
DescriptionLoc:
可筛选搜索物品和关键物品。
无需找人发链接，也能试穿任意物品。

Author: Ottermandias
Name: RezPls
Description:
Easy overview about who is currently resurrecting who,
who is already resurrected,
and who has removable detrimental status effects in the world 
as well as in the group or alliance interface.
Punchline: Highlighting of Raises and detrimental status effects.
PunchlineLoc: 高亮复活与有害状态效果。
DescriptionLoc: 轻松概览当前谁在复活谁、谁已经被复活，以及世界中、小队或团队界面中谁身上有可解除的有害状态效果。

Author: Rül Hölos
Name: Bartender
Description: Save and load hotbars with macros and/or chat commands. We all need more than 10 hotbars, well now we do have those.
Punchline: Save and load hotbars into profiles, re-use them later, profit.
PunchlineLoc: 将热键栏保存并加载为配置档，日后复用，轻松获利。
DescriptionLoc: 通过宏和/或聊天命令保存、加载热键栏。谁不想要超过 10 条热键栏呢？现在我们有了。

Author: Infi
Name: Hunty
Description:
Never has it been that easy to finish your hunting log. 

+ List of monsters in the same location based on Rank
+ Clickable coords to open your map on that exact location
+ Clickable dungeon name to open your duty finder
+ Easy to switch between Grand Company and Jobs
+ Automatic selection based on current job
Punchline: Time to finish your log?
PunchlineLoc: 该清讨伐笔记了吗？
DescriptionLoc:
完成讨伐笔记从未如此简单。

+ 按等级列出同一区域的怪物
+ 可点击坐标，在地图上打开准确位置
+ 可点击副本名称，打开任务搜索器
+ 可在大国防联军和职业之间轻松切换
+ 根据当前职业自动选择

Author: Haplo064
Name: Pixel Perfect
Description: Showing exactly where to stand since 2020. Endorsed by raiders!
Punchline: Reveals your hitbox, with customisable features. Endorsed by world first raiders!
PunchlineLoc: 显示你的判定点，并可自定义。世界首杀玩家推荐！
DescriptionLoc: 自 2020 年起精确指示站位。攻略玩家推荐！

Author: Frogworks Interactive
Name: OOF!
Description:
i love roblox!!! 
           
whimsical and magical features...
  - when other ppl die
  - custom mp3
  - instant access to the hour long documentary on oof by hbomberguy
Punchline: Play OOF! on fall and/or death. The Only Plugin You Need!
PunchlineLoc: 坠落和/或死亡时播放 OOF!。你唯一需要的插件！
DescriptionLoc:
我爱 roblox!!! 
           
异想天开的魔法功能...
  - 其他人死亡时
  - 自定义 mp3
  - 一键观看 hbomberguy 制作的 OOF 一小时纪录片

Author: Franz
Name: ChatTyper
Description: Prefixes all chatbox messages with their chat type number and name, if known.
Punchline: This is still mostly a dev tool for debugging, but people like it?
PunchlineLoc: 主要仍是调试用开发工具，但大家好像挺喜欢？
DescriptionLoc: 在所有聊天框消息前添加其聊天类型编号和名称（如已知）。

Author: spide-r
Name: SoundEffectMuter
Description:
This plugin silences all text sound effects and quick chat.

For feedback, please contact .spider in the Dalamud discord.
Punchline: Quiets the Gameplay Experience.
PunchlineLoc: 让游戏体验安静下来。
DescriptionLoc:
本插件会静音所有文本音效和快捷聊天。

如需反馈，请在 Dalamud Discord 联系 .spider。

Author: MidoriKami
Name: Who am I again?
Description: Shows who you are in the server info bar.
Punchline: Ever forget who you are? We can fix that!
PunchlineLoc: 忘了自己是谁？我们帮你想起来！
DescriptionLoc: 在服务器信息栏显示你是谁。

Author: KazWolfe
Name: XIVDeck
Description:
This plugin allows players to use an Elgato Stream Deck as a virtual utility hot bar. Actions are called directly, meaning there is no need to set up awkward keybinds, custom macros, or any other settings.

Note that the XIVDeck Stream Deck plugin must also be installed for this plugin to be useful. You can download the Stream Deck plugin from the linked GitHub repository, under the "Releases" section.

Please report all problems to KazWolfe#2896 in the Dalamud Support server or by opening an Issue on GitHub.
Punchline: Turn your Elgato Stream Deck into a hotbar!
PunchlineLoc: 把你的 Elgato Stream Deck 变成热键栏！
DescriptionLoc:
此插件允许玩家将 Elgato Stream Deck 用作虚拟实用热键栏。技能会被直接调用，因此无需设置别扭的键位绑定、自定义宏或任何其他设置。

请注意，要让此插件发挥作用，还必须安装 XIVDeck Stream Deck 插件。你可以从链接的 GitHub 仓库的 "Releases" 区域下载 Stream Deck 插件。

请在 Dalamud Support 服务器中向 KazWolfe#2896 报告所有问题，或在 GitHub 上提交 Issue。

Author: Loody
Name: DiscordBotFFXIV
Description: Discord / FFXIV bot to send msg from discord to the game
Punchline: Send message to friends from discord
PunchlineLoc: 从 Discord 给好友发送消息。
DescriptionLoc: 用于从 Discord 向游戏内发送消息的 Discord / FFXIV bot。

Author: Infi, Caitlyn
Name: Better Playtime
Description:
Provides expanded functionality to seamlessly track total playtime.
      Use /btime once on each character to add them.

      - Supports multiple characters,
      - Customisable output formats such as hours or minutes
      - Automatic playtime tracking after character got registered
      - Simple window to see current session playtime
      - Server Info Bar integration
Punchline: Ever wanted detailed information on your playtime all the way down to the second?
PunchlineLoc: 想精确到秒查看你的游戏时间详情吗？
DescriptionLoc:
提供扩展功能，可无缝追踪总游戏时间。
      每个角色使用一次 /btime 即可添加。

      - 支持多个角色，
      - 可自定义输出格式，例如小时或分钟
      - 角色注册后自动追踪游戏时间
      - 简洁窗口可查看当前会话游戏时间
      - 集成服务器信息栏

Author: YF
Name: RealTorch
Description: Makes the torch accessory put out light.
Punchline: Set the world alight!
PunchlineLoc: 点亮整个世界！
DescriptionLoc: 让火把时尚配饰发出光亮。

Author: Critical-Impact
Name: Tippy
Description:
Developed by goat for April Fools 2021 and unnecessarily resurrected by kal and adopted by Critical-Impact.

Handcrafted by our finest code artisans with special AI, 
he will analyze your playstyle to give you useful tips to get your GAMING to the next level.

Some things he can do:
* He can give general tips about the game
* He can give tips about the job you're playing
* He can report on your battle performance
* He will respect your feelings
Punchline: Tippy, your new FFXIV virtual assistant.
PunchlineLoc: Tippy，你的全新 FFXIV 虚拟助手。
DescriptionLoc:
由 goat 为 2021 愚人节开发，又被 kal 多此一举地复活，并由 Critical-Impact 接手。

由我们最优秀的代码工匠搭载特制 AI 手工打造，
他会分析你的游玩风格，为你提供实用建议，让你的 GAMING 更上一层楼。

他能做的一些事：
* 提供游戏通用建议
* 提供与你当前职业相关的建议
* 汇报你的战斗表现
* 尊重你的感受

Author: Meoiswa
Name: Magitek Stratagem
Description: Developed by the ingenious Garlean engineer Tobiias, this revolutionary Magitek device empowers adventurers by enabling hands-free enemy targeting with unparalleled precision.
Punchline: Tobii and Eyeware Eye and Opentrack tracker support for FFXIV
PunchlineLoc: 支持 Tobii、Eyeware Eye 和 Opentrack 追踪器的 FFXIV 插件。
DescriptionLoc: 由聪慧的加雷马工程师 Tobiias 开发，这台革命性的魔导装置能让冒险者免手动瞄准敌人，精度无与伦比。

Author: ItsLunaYup
Name: High FPS Physics Fix
Description:
Causes the game's physics to work at higher FPS by making it update every few frames. 
Toggle with '/physics t', or use on/off instead of t. 
May cause excessive jiggling at lower FPS values. 
Disabling the entire plugin after turning on/off with /physics requires reboot to reenable.
Punchline: Reduces the refresh rate of movement physics, "fixing" it at high fps.
PunchlineLoc: 降低移动物理的刷新率，在高 FPS 下“修复”它。
DescriptionLoc:
通过让游戏每隔几帧更新一次，使游戏物理在更高 FPS 下正常工作。
使用 '/physics t' 切换，也可以用 on/off 代替 t。
在较低 FPS 数值下可能导致抖动过度。
用 /physics 开启/关闭后，如禁用整个插件，需要重启才能重新启用。

Author: Anna, Maintained by chirp & Khayle
Name: Globetrotter
Description:
Automatically shows where treasure maps are located.

Icon: Map by Adrien Coquet from the Noun Project
Punchline: Automatically shows where treasure maps are located.
PunchlineLoc: 自动显示藏宝图所在位置。
DescriptionLoc:
自动显示藏宝图所在位置。

图标：Adrien Coquet 在 Noun Project 发布的 Map

Author: Felscream
Name: DragoonMayCry
Description: A plugin that tries to add flavour to combat. You score by dealing damage and keeping your GCD rolling, and lose points if you are not greeding correctly. Now with dynamic BGM.
Punchline: A plugin that ranks your performance based on your fundamentals in combat
PunchlineLoc: 根据你在战斗中的基本功为表现评分的插件。
DescriptionLoc: 这个插件尝试为战斗增添一些风味。通过造成伤害并保持全局冷却不断档来得分；如果没有正确贪输出则会扣分。现已支持动态 BGM。

Author: Leon Aquitaine
Name: Sightseeingway
Description: Renames screenshots as they are created to include character name, map name, and coordinates. Monitors default, Reshade and GShade screenshots.
Punchline: Automatically rename your screenshots with character and location info.
PunchlineLoc: 自动用角色和地点信息重命名截图。
DescriptionLoc: 截图生成时自动重命名，包含角色名、地图名和坐标。可监控默认截图、Reshade 和 GShade 截图。

Author: Populo
Name: Retainer Sales
Description: Quickly see which retainers have sold something while you were logged off.
Punchline: See retainer sales quicker
PunchlineLoc: 更快查看雇员售出记录
DescriptionLoc: 快速查看你离线期间哪些雇员卖出了物品。

Author: d87
Name: BigPlayerDebuffs
Description: Scales up buffs/debuffs applied by you on Target Status frames
Punchline: Larger personal debuffs
Changelog:
* v1.1.0.9
 * 6.5 Dalamud Update
PunchlineLoc: 放大个人减益。
DescriptionLoc: 放大目标状态栏中由你施加的增益/减益。

Author: ItsBexy
Name: Gauge-O-Matic
Description: Gauge-O-Matic allows you to customize your job gauges by adding extra counters, bars, and indicators in a variety of styles
Punchline: Enhance and customize job gauges.
PunchlineLoc: 增强并自定义职业量谱。
DescriptionLoc: Gauge-O-Matic 可让你通过添加额外计数器、计量条和指示器，以多种风格自定义职业量谱。

Author: Sub07
Name: Flash When Cutscene Done
Description: Flash the game in taskbar when a cutscene ends and the game is unfocused.
Punchline: Flash the game in taskbar when a cutscene ends and the game is unfocused.
PunchlineLoc: 过场动画结束且游戏未聚焦时，让任务栏中的游戏闪烁。
DescriptionLoc: 过场动画结束且游戏未聚焦时，让任务栏中的游戏闪烁。

Author: Raytheon Vers
Name: Backseat Driver
Description: No more frantic googling in duties. Use to get general and role-specific duty hints straight in the chat window.
Punchline: Easily get general and role-specific hints in duties.
PunchlineLoc: 在副本任务中轻松获取通用和职能提示。
DescriptionLoc: 不用再在副本任务里慌忙搜索攻略。可直接在聊天窗口获取通用及职能专属的副本提示。

Author: ssalazar217 (SteSE)
Name: EchoXIV
Description:
EchoXIV is a chat translation tool for FFXIV. It translates both incoming and outgoing chat messages so you can communicate more naturally with players who use other languages.
Key Features:
- Bidirectional chat translation for incoming and outgoing messages.
- Configurable reading and writing languages.
- Smart failover with automatic switching between Papago and Google.
- Integrated Dalamud chat window for translated messages.

[Español]
EchoXIV es una herramienta de traducción de chat para FFXIV. Traduce mensajes entrantes y salientes para que puedas comunicarte de forma más natural con jugadores que usan otros idiomas.
Características:
- Traducción bidireccional para mensajes entrantes y salientes.
- Idiomas de lectura y escritura configurables.
- Failover inteligente con cambio automático entre Papago y Google.
- Ventana integrada de Dalamud para mensajes traducidos.
Punchline: Bidirectional chat translation in Dalamud with auto-failover. / Traducción bidireccional de chat en Dalamud con failover automático.
Changelog: v1.0.0.0: Initial release. Bidirectional chat translation with /tl command, automatic incoming translation, and multi-language UI support.
TestingChangelog: v1.0.0.0: Initial release. Bidirectional chat translation with /tl command, automatic incoming translation, and multi-language UI support.
PunchlineLoc: Dalamud 中的双向聊天翻译，支持自动故障转移。/ Dalamud 中的双向聊天翻译，支持自动故障转移。
DescriptionLoc:
EchoXIV 是一款 FFXIV 聊天翻译工具。它会翻译收到和发出的聊天消息，让你能更自然地与使用其他语言的玩家交流。
主要功能：
- 对收到和发出的消息进行双向聊天翻译。
- 可配置阅读和发送语言。
- 智能故障转移，可在 Papago 和 Google 之间自动切换。
- 集成 Dalamud 聊天窗口，用于显示翻译后的消息。

[Español]
EchoXIV 是一款 FFXIV 聊天翻译工具。它会翻译收发消息，让你能更自然地与使用其他语言的玩家交流。
功能：
- 收发消息的双向翻译。
- 可配置阅读和书写语言。
- 智能故障转移，可在 Papago 和 Google 之间自动切换。
- 集成 Dalamud 窗口，用于显示翻译后的消息。

Author: NetStyx
Name: A Realm Repopulated
Description: This plugin aims to give players the ability to add more flavor npcs to the common areas of the game.
Punchline: The realm, now with more realm in it
PunchlineLoc: 让这片天地更有人气。
DescriptionLoc: 此插件旨在让玩家能够向游戏的常用区域添加更多氛围 NPC。

Author: mikelosx
Name: Shrinkage
Description:
This plugin will shrink and grow characters based on how much health they have, affects you and your party 

/shrinkage to open the config window.
Punchline: Shrinks characters based on their Health!
PunchlineLoc: 根据生命值缩小角色！
DescriptionLoc:
此插件会根据角色剩余生命值缩小或放大角色，会影响你和你的小队。

使用 /shrinkage 打开设置窗口。

Author: rose
Name: Drawers
Description:
You can use this plugin to use the /draw or /sheathe emotes instead of your usual weapon draw/sheathe. You'll need to set up the /drawers command as a macro and bind a key to it. 

(Also, you'll obviously need the emotes themselves)
Punchline: Draw or sheathe a little better(?)
PunchlineLoc: 让拔刀或收刀稍微更好看（？）
DescriptionLoc:
你可以使用此插件，用 /draw 或 /sheathe 情感动作替代通常的拔出/收起武器动作。你需要将 /drawers 命令设置为宏并绑定按键。 

（当然，你也显然需要拥有这些情感动作本身）

Author: Chirp + Bwuny
Name: Pathfinder
Description: A tool for visually locating any model path in the game world.
Punchline: Visualizer for nearby model paths. Adds +5 to perception.
PunchlineLoc: 附近模型路径可视化。获得感知+5。
DescriptionLoc: 一个用于在游戏世界中直观定位任意模型路径的工具。

Author: Enthusiastus
Name: AkuTrack
Description:
AkuTrack is a project to offer an improved ingame map enriched with information found by visiting on site.

This is achieved by collecting the data on a remote server once a user encounters it.

	- Adds NPC spawns to the map
	- Adds objects like Entrances and Exits
	- Adds Gathering Points independent of current job
Punchline: Shows an improved ingame (and outgame map) and collects the seen information to display later.
PunchlineLoc: 显示改进版的游戏内外地图，并收集见过的信息供之后显示。
DescriptionLoc:
AkuTrack 旨在提供改进版游戏内地图，并用实地访问发现的信息丰富地图内容。

这是通过在用户遇到相关内容后，将数据收集到远程服务器来实现的。

	- 将 NPC 出现位置添加到地图
	- 添加入口和出口等物体
	- 添加不受当前职业限制的采集点

Author: anqied
Name: Total Character Level
Description: Adds numbers to the Classes/Jobs panel showing the sum of the levels of all your jobs.
Punchline: Ever wanted to know how many levels you have across all your jobs?
PunchlineLoc: 想知道所有职业等级加起来有多少吗？
DescriptionLoc: 在职业面板中添加数字，显示所有职业等级的总和。

Author: j0giwa
Name: ComfyLoot
Description: Tracks the contents and market value of items dropped while killing monsters. And drops from some other activities such as dungeons, raids, gathering, and maps.
Punchline: RuneLite inspired drop-tracker
PunchlineLoc: 受 RuneLite 启发的掉落追踪器。
DescriptionLoc: 追踪击杀怪物时掉落物品的内容和市场价值，也会追踪来自副本、大型任务、采集和藏宝图等其他活动的掉落。

Author: mkalash
Name: Vanilla Hotbar Extender
Description: Allows you to use commands to save the actions in a hotbar and then load them into any other hotbar. Like the vanilla "/hotbar copy" command, but unlimited, without taking up other hotbars to save the actions.
Punchline: Save and load actions into hotbars without taking up extra job hotbars.
PunchlineLoc: 保存并载入热键栏技能，无需占用额外热键栏。
DescriptionLoc: 允许你使用命令保存某个热键栏中的技能，然后将其载入到任意其他热键栏。类似原版 "/hotbar copy" 命令，但不受数量限制，也不需要占用其他热键栏来保存技能。

Author: Marethyu
Name: Where's my mouse
Description:
Add UI element on top of the mouse like circle to keep track of your mouse location during gameplay.
Open settings with /wmm
Punchline: Allows you to not lose track of your mouse on the screen
PunchlineLoc: 让你不再在屏幕上找不到鼠标。
DescriptionLoc:
在鼠标上方添加圆圈等 UI 元素，方便在游戏过程中追踪鼠标位置。
使用 /wmm 打开设置。

Author: Miu-B
Name: PullToOBS
Description: A Dalamud plugin that automatically controls OBS recording during FFXIV encounters. Captures replay buffer before pulls and full encounter recordings via OBS WebSocket v5. Supports quick-save hotkey for on-demand replay buffer clips. Use /pulltoobs or /pto to configure.
Punchline: Automated OBS recording manager for FFXIV encounters.
PunchlineLoc: 适用于 FFXIV 战斗的自动 OBS 录制管理器。
DescriptionLoc: 一个 Dalamud 插件，可在 FFXIV 战斗中自动控制 OBS 录制。通过 OBS WebSocket v5，在开怪前捕捉回放缓冲，并录制完整战斗。支持快速保存热键，可按需保存回放缓冲片段。使用 /pulltoobs 或 /pto 进行设置。

Author: Abyeon
Name: Racingway
Description: A simple plugin for timing, logging, and ranking player times for your jumping puzzles!
Punchline: Time your jumping puzzles!
PunchlineLoc: 为你的跳跳乐计时！
DescriptionLoc: 一个简单插件，可为你的跳跳乐计时、记录并排行玩家成绩！

Author: Saddlebag Exchange
Name: Saddlebag Exchange
Description: Advanced marketboard tools and cross-world arbitrage scanning.
Punchline: Marketboard analytics for FFXIV
PunchlineLoc: FFXIV 市场板分析工具。
DescriptionLoc: 高级市场板工具与跨服务器套利扫描。

Author: SamuelSapp
Name: Fast Waymarks
Description: Fast waymarks with settings for common configurations. Rotate and resize with a handy preview window.
Punchline: For when you want to spend time fighting the boss, not fiddling with waymarks.
PunchlineLoc: 把时间花在打 Boss 上，而不是折腾场景标记。
DescriptionLoc: 带常用配置设置的快速场景标记。可通过便捷的预览窗口旋转和调整大小。

Author: Fuwa Aika
Name: Housing Herald
Description: A Dalamud plugin for FFXIV that reminds the player when the results are in for the house they bid on
Punchline: Automatic house bidding reminders!
PunchlineLoc: 自动提醒房屋抽选结果！
DescriptionLoc: 一款用于 FFXIV 的 Dalamud 插件，会在玩家参与抽选的房屋公布结果时提醒玩家。

Author: keysmashes
Name: Limit Break, Now!
Description: When a Limit Break becomes available, shows a visual notification.
Punchline: Get notified when a Limit Break is available
PunchlineLoc: 极限技可用时发出提醒。
DescriptionLoc: 极限技可用时显示视觉提醒。

Author: Ennea
Name: Very Important Item
Description: Adding and removing items to and from the list of very important items can be done in the plugin's configuration window and by right-clicking items in the game. Very important items get their name highlighted in the tooltip, and a sound effect plays in addition to that to ensure you've seen its presence.
Punchline: Tag items as important, highlighting them visually. Now with sound!
PunchlineLoc: 将物品标记为重要并高亮显示。现在还有音效！
DescriptionLoc: 可在插件配置窗口中，或在游戏内右键点击物品，将物品加入或移出非常重要物品列表。非常重要的物品会在提示信息中高亮名称，并额外播放音效，确保你注意到它。

Author: ElyFura
Name: Easy Chatlog
Description: Captures your in-game chat, exports it (txt/json/html/md) and optionally forwards it live to a Discord channel via webhook or bot. Type /easychatlog to open the main window or /easychatlog config for settings.
Punchline: Export your chat and forward it to Discord.
PunchlineLoc: 导出聊天并转发到 Discord。
DescriptionLoc: 捕获你的游戏内聊天，导出为 txt/json/html/md，并可选择通过 webhook 或 bot 实时转发到 Discord 频道。输入 /easychatlog 打开主窗口，或输入 /easychatlog config 打开设置。

Author: Bryer
Name: Maiden Alert
Description: Maidens will now emit audible notification, chat message and on-screen tracker!
Punchline: Don't miss any Maiden spawn anymore!
PunchlineLoc: 不再错过任何迷失少女刷新！
DescriptionLoc: 迷失少女现在会触发声音提醒、聊天信息和屏幕追踪器！

Author: silasary
Name: ArchipelagoXIV
Description: Key Item Randomizer for FFIXV
Punchline: Client for the Archipelago Multiworld Randomizer.
PunchlineLoc: Archipelago Multiworld Randomizer 的客户端。
DescriptionLoc: FFXIV 的重要物品随机化器

Author: Richter
Name: Support for Ukrainian in chat
Description: Support for Ukrainian characters in chat input field. When using the Ukrainian keyboard layout, this plugin remaps keys so that Ukrainian letters are correctly entered in the chat input. This plugin is supported on Windows only.
Punchline: Support for Ukrainian characters in chat input field.
PunchlineLoc: 支持在聊天输入框输入乌克兰语字符。
DescriptionLoc: 支持在聊天输入框输入乌克兰语字符。使用乌克兰语键盘布局时，此插件会重新映射按键，使乌克兰语字母能够正确输入到聊天框中。此插件仅支持 Windows。

Author: Nerifyra
Name: RP Utils
Description: A suite of features to support roleplay. /rputils
Punchline: Supporting your RP needs.
PunchlineLoc: 支持你的RP需求。
DescriptionLoc: 一套用于支持角色扮演的功能。/rputils

Author: MaryUsagi
Name: HUD Layout Helper
Description:
Allows you to use keyboard shortcuts in the HUD Layout Editor, like Ctrl+C and Ctrl+V to copy and paste the position of individual HUD elements, and Ctrl+Z and Ctrl+Y to undo and redo changes. 

Can also display an overlay showing alignment to other elements with Ctrl+R.
Punchline: Adds QoL features to the native HUD layout editor: Undo, Redo, Copy, Paste and alignment lines.
PunchlineLoc: 为自带HUD编辑器添加撤销、复制、对齐线等便利功能。
DescriptionLoc:
允许你在 HUD布局编辑器中使用键盘快捷键，例如用 Ctrl+C 和 Ctrl+V 复制并粘贴单个 HUD 元素的位置，用 Ctrl+Z 和 Ctrl+Y 撤销与重做更改。

还可以用 Ctrl+R 显示叠加层，查看与其他元素的对齐情况。

Author: NotNite
Name: Moonbase Omega
Description: Plays chat messages sent in Cosmic Exploration via DECtalk (the TTS used in Moonbase Alpha).
Punchline: Adds Moonbase Alpha TTS when in Cosmic Exploration. aeiou!
PunchlineLoc: 在宇宙探索中加入 Moonbase Alpha TTS。aeiou!
DescriptionLoc: 通过 DECtalk（Moonbase Alpha 使用的 TTS）播放宇宙探索中的聊天信息。

Author: ryankhart
Name: Restore Camera Pivot While Auto-Running
Description:
Temporarily restores legacy camera pivot while auto-running.
Only affects Legacy Type movement with Disable camera pivot enabled.
Punchline: Restore legacy camera pivot while auto-running.
NameLoc: 自动奔跑时恢复镜头轴心
PunchlineLoc: 自动奔跑时恢复旧版镜头轴心。
DescriptionLoc:
在自动奔跑时临时恢复旧版镜头轴心。
仅影响启用了固定视角修正的“传统：基于视角朝向的操作方式”。

Author: Pistachio Herald
Name: Faded Orchestrion Roll Fixer
Description: An FFXIV plugin to make fixing faded orchestrion rolls easier.
Punchline: Generate a crafting list for the faded orchestrion rolls in your inventory
PunchlineLoc: 为背包中的陈旧管弦乐琴乐谱生成制作清单
DescriptionLoc: 为背包中的陈旧管弦乐琴乐谱生成制作清单。使用 /faded 开始

Author: EuphoricCrashOut
Name: DutySpeed
Description: A simple speedrun timer for FFXIV duties.
Punchline: Track your duty completion speeds with ease.
PunchlineLoc: 轻松追踪你的副本任务完成速度。
DescriptionLoc: FFXIV 副本任务用的简单速通计时器。

Author: apetih
Name: RTyping
Description: Allows other people using this plugin to see your typing status when in the same party.
Punchline: Let people know when you r typing.
PunchlineLoc: 让别人知道你正在打字。
DescriptionLoc: 允许同样使用此插件的其他人在同一小队中看到你的打字状态。

Author: Kurochi
Name: Pet Scale
Description: Adjust the scale of your own pets and other player's pets, independent of each other.
Punchline: Customize pet scale
PunchlineLoc: 自定义召唤兽大小。
DescriptionLoc: 分别调整你自己的召唤兽和其他玩家召唤兽的大小。

Author: OncaLupe
Name: Train Tracker
Description: See just the conductor's messages so you don't miss flags, instance messages, or other instructions.
Punchline: Hunt train helper to make it easier to track where it's heading.

Author: Infi, Anna
Name: Chat 2
Description:
Chat 2 is a complete rewrite of the in-game chat window as a plugin.
It supports:

- Unlimited tabs
- Tabs that always send to a certain channel
- More flexible filtering
- RGB channel colouring
- Completely variable font size
- Sidebar tabs
- Unread counts
- Emotes
- Screenshot mode (obfuscate names)
Punchline: Electric Boogaloo - ♪ A whole new chat, a new fantastic chat window ♪
Changelog:
**New Feature Added~**
- A web interface has been added
- *This will not function if your game client is offline or you are logged out of the game*

**Main Features**
- View in-game chat on any device that has a web browser functionality
- Can send chat messages through the web interface directly into the game itself
- Easily copy & paste messages
- Option for automatic starting the web interface feature
- Log lines render limit for faster loading performance [Default 1000]

**Security**
- This feature is not intended to be used outside of your local, private network
- Do not forward ports that are described inside the chat2 options panel
- Never share your authentication code under any circumstances
- Multi-box support is not provided, the web interface will track only the first client

**Additional Features soon to be Added**
- Display errors as small notifications inside the web interface

**Planned Features**
- Multiple Tabs support
- Browser specific settings
- Stylization support

**Additional Permissions Note**
- Users that wish to expand this to apps or other platforms are welcome to do so

*Note: An FAQ will be provided in the chat2 thread on the dalamud discord, linked in the About section*
PunchlineLoc: 电光霹雳舞——♪ 全新的聊天窗口 ♪
DescriptionLoc:
Chat 2 是以插件形式完全重写的游戏内聊天窗口。
支持：

- 无限标签页
- 指定标签页始终发送到特定频道
- 更灵活的过滤
- RGB 频道颜色
- 字体大小完全可调
- 侧边栏标签页
- 未读计数
- 表情
- 截图模式（隐藏姓名）
